channel.title: MYB
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why Agentic AI Is Breaking The SaaS Pricing Model
item.description: As we move deeper into AI transformation, there is a growing tendency to focus on the obvious productivity gains. Generative and agentic AI are clearl...

item.title: AI Such As ChatGPT And GPT-5.2 Eerily Overstepping Into Mental Health Advisement On Normal Everyday Questions
item.description: People are getting excessive mental health advice from generative AI. This is unsolicited advice. Here's the backstory and what to do about it. An AI ...

item.title: Time To Accept That GenAI Will Replace Much Of What Clinicians Do
item.description: In recent years, technology companies and health systems insisted large language models would assist and support clinicians, not replace them. They're...

item.title: When Is Ramadan? When And Where To See The Crescent Moon This Week
item.description: The sighting of a crescent moon determines the beginning of Ramadan, when Muslims fast from dawn to sunset. Here's when to see the "Ramadan Moon" in t...

item.title: Piping Hot Bees And Boisterous Buzz-Runners By Thomas D. Seeley — Review
item.description: The personal backstory to 20 of the most exciting research projects that the author has been part of during his 50 years of research into the abilitie...

item.title: How to write a coaching/learning prompt
item.description: An AI like Claude is actually a pretty good fortune cookie. You can ask a simple question and get a simple answer, sometimes a profound one. But this ...

item.title: Misguided optimization
item.description: Industrialism brought us the idea of optimization. Incremental improvements combined with measurement to gradually improve results. We can optimize fo...

item.title: Mysterious predictability
item.description: A watched pot will boil. As it heats up, there’s no way to predict where the cavitation will start and which bubble will arrive first. But with enough...

item.title: Better vs. done
item.description: “There, it’s done.” This is the production mindset and the rule of school. Pencils down. Hand it in. The alternative is, “Sign me up for a commitment ...

item.title: Things that feel risky
item.description: Often aren’t. In fact, they might be the safest way forward.
